caption: The video appears to be an outro or call-to-action segment from a content piece related to cryptocurrency, specifically from Cointelegraph, which is known for covering topics on the future of money and blockchain technology. The screen displays the Cointelegraph logo with the tagline "The Future of Money" prominently featured at the top. Below this, there are three distinct icons accompanied by text: a thumbs-up icon with the word "like," a YouTube play button with the word "subscribe," and a Bitcoin symbol with the word "hodl." These elements encourage viewers to engage with the content by liking it, subscribing to the channel, and holding onto their cryptocurrency investments, reflecting common practices in the crypto community. The overall design is clean and straightforward, aimed at driving viewer interaction and reinforcing brand identity.
